title: Motor Assistance
description: Aim assistance for blocks and mobs. A must-have with controllers or players with disabilities. (no PvP advantage)
body: # Motor Assistance A Minecraft Mod that helps to aim **without giving an unfair PvP advantage (and it won't change in the future)**. Built for players with motor disabilities. Also useful for new players that are not used to play on a computer. Ideal to introduce Minecraft to your parents! It can also ease the use of a controller (let me know if it does not work). Discord: https://discord.gg/yxMhpgUGjf ## Works with any controller mod *If you encounter any issue with one of these controller mods, send me a message. I always test with Controlify.* ## Demo ![Fighting assistance](https://github.com/lilmods/motor-assistance/blob/main/.github/assets/motorassistance-fighting.gif?raw=true) _Fighting assistance (**it does not work on other players**)_ --- ![Mining assistance](https://github.com/lilmods/motor-assistance/blob/main/.github/assets/motorassistance-mining.gif?raw=true) _Mining assistance_ --- ![Motor assistance config](https://github.com/lilmods/motor-assistance/blob/main/.github/assets/motorassistance-config.png?raw=true ) _Configuration screen_
